reasoning: The featured_japan_heritage_food_stories block contains story_id 051 — a direct, authoritative hit covering 中芸地域 yuzu (奈半利町/田野町/安田町/北川村/馬路村), ゆずロード, and ゆず寿司, which partially rescues intent and specificity. However, the tool was called with no keyword filter, producing 651 matches truncated to 500; the 中芸ゆず-specific MAFF GI entry (if registered) is not visible in the returned items. The top items include 物部ゆず (a different Kochi yuzu GI from Kami City) and noise entries (a Buddhist temple, a tourism route article) mislabeled as regional_dish. No featured_cluster block fired (RULE E not applicable). Single root cause per RULE B: ranking — relevant 中芸ゆず GI buried below noise in a 651-item unfiltered dump.
missing_data: 中芸ゆず as a specific MAFF GI or dedicated data entity is not surfaced in the visible 500 items. Access details (train to Nahari, road distance from Kochi city), yuzu harvesting season (October–December), and local product purchase spots (馬路村農協 products, ゆずの森) are absent.
wrong_data: 物部ゆず (maff_gi:96) is a legitimate Kochi yuzu GI but from Kami City (香美市・物部), not the 中芸 region — its presence as a top item without distinguishing the sub-regional difference could mislead an agent into conflating the two products. The scraped_local_food items (日蓮宗 要法寺, tourism route article) are genuine scraped records but are misclassified as regional_dish and are not relevant to 中芸ゆず.
improvement_hint: Add keyword='中芸ゆず' or keyword='ゆず' when calling get_local_food for a sub-regional yuzu query, or use search_hybrid with the full query string to surface the 中芸ゆず GI record directly. Server-side: tighten scraped_local_food category filtering to reduce non-food noise in items; add a featured_cluster for 中芸ゆず covering the five villages.
